definition: The directional lean for the current trading day, determined BEFORE the kill zones activate.
depends_on: IPDA (where price sits in macro range)
feeds_into: trade entry (only take trades aligned with daily bias)
PO3_AMD (bias tells you WHICH direction distribution will go)
related_to: CRT (previous daily candle's range predicts today's direction)
dealing_range (today's range expands from yesterday's levels)

determination_methods.HTF_structure: H4/D1 BOS or clear HH/HL (bullish) or LH/LL (bearish). Most reliable method.
determination_methods.previous_day_close: If price closed near PDH → bullish continuation expected. Near PDL → bearish. Near middle → unclear, reduce conviction.
determination_methods.IPDA_positioning: If price is in lower 25% of IPDA 40-day range → bullish bias (discount). Upper 25% → bearish bias (premium).
determination_methods.session_level_proximity: If PDL is close and unswept → expect sweep of PDL then rally (bullish). If PDH close and unswept → sweep PDH then sell (bearish).
determination_methods.CRT_method: Look at previous daily candle: if high was taken but low held → today likely targets low. If low taken but high held → today targets high.

key_rule: Establish bias ONCE before trading starts. Do NOT flip bias during the session. If manipulation goes against bias, it's the trap — hold the bias.
